scripts.docker:dev: docker compose --env-file infra/.env -f infra/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build
scripts.docker:prod: docker compose --env-file infra/.env -f infra/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --build
scripts.docker:down: docker compose --env-file infra/.env -f infra/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.dev.yml down
scripts.verify: pnpm test:phase2 && pnpm test:mobile && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter mobile typecheck
